title: Compression engine is never triggered by the agent loop
description: The CompressionEngine implements all 4 compression layers but the AgentEngine._react_loop never checks token usage or calls compression.compact(). The 75% auto-compact trigger and 90% hard-truncation line are dead code. _react_loop never invokes self.compression.compact(...).

title: Permission check is not wired into tool execution in the engine
description: PermissionController with 4-level system is fully implemented and wired into AgentEngine.__init__, but _execute_tool() never calls self.permissions.check() before running a tool. Only BashTool performs its own inline check; all other tools execute unconditionally.

title: MCP server startup and tool registration is not connected
description: MCPClient and MCPToolAdapter are fully implemented but main.py never reads mcp.json configuration, never spawns MCP server subprocesses, and never registers MCP tools via ToolRegistry.

title: Dream engine is never auto-triggered on startup
description: DreamEngine.should_run() and run() are implemented but never constructed, wired, or called in main.py's async_main. The /dream slash command references ctx.dream_engine which is always None.

title: Compressor references wrong config path for tool_result_max_chars
description: CompressionEngine._layer2_summarize accesses self.config.tool_result_max_chars but self.config is a CompressionConfig dataclass (no such field). The field lives on ToolsConfig, so hasattr always fails and the hardcoded fallback 5000 is always used.

title: Stream interruption handling — no partial content preservation
description: When a stream is interrupted the engine catches the exception but does not preserve already-received text chunks. The user sees an error with no option to continue. Spec requires preserving partial content with a 'Continue? (y/n)' prompt.

title: Sub-agent worker does not persist transcripts
description: SubAgentWorker runs its ReAct loop but never writes transcript data. SessionStore has no method for creating/saving sub-agent transcripts. Sub-agent transcript files are never created.

title: Status bar sub-agent details never populated from pool
description: StatusBar has fields for subagents_active and subagents_details but no mechanism connects SubAgentPool state changes to StatusBar.update(). The status bar always shows 0 active sub-agents.

title: Daily log rotation not implemented — size-based only
description: Uses RotatingFileHandler (size-based only) instead of the spec's required TimedRotatingFileHandler combined with daily rotation. Filenames lack date stamps.

title: LLM prompt logging to .prompts/ directory not implemented
description: When logging.llm_prompts=true and DEBUG level, full prompts should be written to ~/.myagent/logs/.prompts/ as separate files. Not implemented; only metadata is logged.

title: spawn_subagent model parameter exposes Anthropic model names
description: SpawnSubagentTool defines a model parameter with enum values ['sonnet', 'opus', 'haiku', 'fable'] — Anthropic model names in a DeepSeek project. The design spec does not include a model parameter.

title: Intent detection incomplete — only handles 'stop' and 'continue'
description: _detect_intent only handles 'stop' and 'continue' signals. The 'correct' (direction correction) and 'insert' (insert new task) intent signals from the spec are not detected.

title: AskUserQuestion has no 120s timeout mechanism
description: The engine detects questions and yields AskUserQuestion but there is no 120s timeout. The REPL waits indefinitely. Spec requires 120s timeout with auto-decision on expiry.

title: Tool call results not persisted to session tools/ directory
description: SessionStore.save_tool_call() exists but is never called in _execute_tool(). Tool call results are logged but not persisted to disk in the tools/call-NNN.json directory.

title: Compression summaries never saved to disk
description: CompressionEngine._layer3_summarize produces summaries but only keeps them in memory. No call to SessionStore to persist generated summaries to summaries/compact-NNN.md.

title: Session end flow — permission persistence and memory summary are stubs
description: SessionManager.end_session() has placeholder comments for permission persistence prompting and memory change summary. Both are commented out.

title: PermissionController does not track runtime rule changes
description: apply_runtime_rule() modifies rules but does not record a changelog. No method exists to retrieve session changes for the end-of-session persistence prompt.

title: Dream consolidation is limited — missing pattern extraction from transcripts
description: DreamEngine.run() only does dedup and empty cleanup. Does not scan session transcripts for patterns, does not use LLM to identify new conventions, detect repeated corrections, or merge contradictory memories.

title: Built-in skill SKILL.md files are missing
description: SkillRegistry's builtin_dir defaults to Path(__file__).parent / 'builtin' but this directory does not exist. No SKILL.md files for any planned built-in skill.

title: Sub-agent message forwarding during execution not supported
description: SubAgentPool.send_message() stores a message but SubAgentWorker only checks interrupt_event between iterations — non-stop messages are never read or processed by the worker.

title: Background speculative exploration config not enforced
description: Config field speculative_exploration exists but SpawnSubagentTool.execute() and SubAgentPool.spawn() never check it. Background is always whatever the model passes, regardless of goal mode vs non-goal mode.

title: Session listing display is plain text — missing rich formatting
description: --list-sessions outputs simple plain text. Spec requires Rich-formatted table with status icons, duration, token count, goal achievement status.

title: Ctrl+C idle exit flow does not match spec
description: REPL catches KeyboardInterrupt and exits immediately without asking 'Exit? (y/n)' and without triggering the session end flow.

title: LLM response log missing tool_calls_count field
description: Spec example includes 'tool_calls_count': 2. Code logs token_consumption but does not count or log number of tool calls in the response.

title: 50% manual compact recommendation not implemented
description: Compression flow shows a 50% threshold recommending manual compact. Neither engine nor compressor notifies the user when context reaches 50%.

title: engine._execute_tool does not consult permissions for MCP tools
description: MCPToolAdapter sets permission_level=3, but since engine does not check permissions at all during tool execution, MCP tools also execute without permission gates. Network-write via MCP is unprotected.

title: Memory recall does not use session-scoped cache across turns
description: ContextBuilder.build() calls recall() every turn instead of loading memories once at session startup. Semantic search runs repeatedly with same results.

title: No config value validation
description: ConfigLoader loads and merges config from 7 levels but performs no validation. Out-of-range values like primary_threshold=1.5 or max_concurrent=-1 are accepted silently.

title: session --export flag returns existing files rather than generating export
description: SessionStore.export_session() simply returns the path of transcript.md or transcript.json. It does not generate a self-contained Markdown export file.

title: Sub-agent result retirement (ResultConsumed state) not tracked
description: Spec lifecycle diagram shows a ResultConsumed state after main agent reads result. Code has CREATED/RUNNING/COMPLETED/FAILED/INTERRUPTED but not ResultConsumed.

title: Project context not passed to sub-agents
description: Spec says sub-agents receive L3 Project Context filtered for relevance. SubAgentWorker does not receive structured project metadata in its system prompt.

title: skill_invoke handling is incomplete — no re-injection into system prompt
description: Engine detects skill_invoke but ContextBuilder.build() is called once per user input, not per ReAct iteration. Skill content is not re-injected for subsequent LLM calls in the same turn.

title: Retry progress not communicated to status bar
description: LLMProvider has retry logic but no reference to status bar and no mechanism to communicate retry progress back to the UI layer.

title: MCP transport abstraction layer not present
description: MCPClient hardcodes stdio subprocess communication. No transport abstraction (Protocol/ABC) for SSE or other transports to plug into.

title: Dream log writing does not include dream analysis narrative
description: DreamEngine.run() log is purely mechanical (deleted X, deduped Y). Spec says dreams should include substantive analysis: patterns found, new memories created, contradictions resolved.

title: /skill-name forced invocation not implemented
description: CommandDispatcher only handles 7 hardcoded slash commands and returns 'Unknown command' for anything else. Spec requires /skill-name prefix to force loading and executing a specified skill.

title: Dream engine does not create or update memories from analysis
description: Dream engine runs analysis but only writes findings to the dream log. It never creates new memory files or updates existing ones based on analysis. memories_created and memories_updated always remain 0.

title: MCP prompts/list not called during startup
description: _start_single_mcp_server calls client.list_tools() and client.list_resources() but never calls client.list_prompts(). MCPClient has no list_prompts method at all.

title: Permission config persistence is a placeholder (not wired)
description: At session end the user is prompted to persist permission changes but actual YAML file write is not implemented — only a placeholder message is shown.

title: No auto-completion (Completer) in REPL
description: prompt_toolkit PromptSession is created without a completer parameter. Spec architecture table lists auto-completion as a REPL Engine feature.

title: LLM response prompt files not written to .prompts/
description: Only request JSON files are written; response JSON files are never written. _write_prompt_logs is called before the API call but not after the response is received.

title: StatusBar runs its own Live display, uncoordinated with REPL
description: StatusBar creates its own Rich Live instance and the REPL creates its own Console independently — two separate rendering contexts that may overlap or produce garbled output.

title: StatusBar sub-agent details show only raw status enum values
description: Sub-agent detail lines show only raw AgentStatus enum values. Spec shows rich display with task names, progress %, result summaries, and emoji indicators.

title: Compression minimum_savings check never enforced
description: CompressionConfig.minimum_savings field is defined but never read or enforced. Spec's debounce rule ('compression savings < 10% → skip') is dead code.

title: LLM response log missing individual prompt_tokens/completion_tokens
description: Only token_consumption (total) is logged. Spec requires separate prompt_tokens and completion_tokens fields in structured log.

title: Agent ReAct log missing tokens_used_this_turn
description: ReAct iteration log entries do not include the spec-required tokens_used_this_turn field reflecting per-iteration token consumption.

title: System startup log missing config_hash, python_version, platform
description: Startup log writes only category and event. Spec requires config_hash, python_version, and platform fields.

title: Dream engine detects stale memories but does not delete them
description: Stale memories (>30 days unaccessed) are listed in the dream report but never deleted. Only empty memories and duplicates are removed.

title: ContextBuilder internal variable naming deviates from 6-layer model
description: build() method uses variables l5 for skill content and l6 for goal context, which are not actual layers. This misaligns code variable names with the documented L0-L6 layer model.

title: Built-in skills missing resource directories
description: All 6 built-in skills contain only SKILL.md files. Resource subdirectories (references/, scripts/, templates/, assets/) specified in the design are absent.

title: spawn_subagent schema parameter stored but never used
description: The schema parameter is defined in spawn_subagent, passed through pool.spawn(), but never referenced during sub-agent execution. It should define structured output format.

title: Dream engine calls MemoryStore.write() with wrong keyword arguments — runtime crash
description: _merge_contradictions() and _create_memories_from_patterns() call self.memory_store.write(name=..., content=..., description=...) but MemoryStore.write() signature is write(self, file_path: str, content: str). Will raise TypeError at runtime.

title: Log category fields not serialized — JsonLineFormatter expects extra_fields but most code uses standard extra
description: JsonLineFormatter.format() reads record.extra_fields but nearly all log call sites use standard extra={...} which Python logging expands as individual record attributes. Formatter never picks up category-specific fields; they are silently dropped from JSON output.

title: Compression summaries never persisted — CompressionEngine._session_dir never set
description: _layer3_summarize() calls _persist_summary() which needs _session_dir, but it is initialized as None and never assigned. Summaries are silently skipped and never written to disk.

title: No per-turn message persistence during agent execution
description: SessionStore.save_turn() and _write_transcripts() exist but are never called during live agent execution. Messages accumulate in-memory only. If process crashes, all in-flight messages are lost.

title: LLM request log missing thinking_mode and stream fields
description: Spec defines fields for LLM request: model, thinking_mode, messages_count, estimated_tokens, tools_count, stream. Implementation omits thinking_mode and stream.

title: Sub-agent logs missing parent_session and prompt_summary fields
description: Spec defines sub-agent log fields: subagent_id, event, parent_session, prompt_summary, duration_ms. Pool logs only category and event type; parent_session and prompt_summary are absent.

title: No mechanism for config runtime overrides from natural language conversation
description: ConfigLoader.apply_runtime_override() exists but is never called from the agent engine. Users cannot change config (thinking mode, concurrency, etc.) via natural language mid-conversation. Only permission rules have this pathway.

title: MemoryWriteTool bypasses MemoryStore — no dedup, no session log
description: MemoryWriteTool.execute() writes files directly via path.write_text() instead of using MemoryStore.write(). This bypasses dedup by frontmatter name and session memory logging.

title: Log rotation uses date-prefixed filenames instead of TimedRotatingFileHandler
description: Implementation uses RotatingFileHandler with date-prefixed filenames, not Python's TimedRotatingFileHandler. A long-running session spanning midnight will continue writing to the old date's file.

title: No mid-execution user interrupt capability in REPL
description: REPL's process_input() awaits the entire agent execution before accepting new input. User cannot interrupt a running agent. Ctrl+C only resets input buffer, not interrupts execution.

title: /help slash command listed but not handled
description: SlashCompleter.BUILTIN_COMMANDS includes 'help' but CommandDispatcher._register_defaults() does not register a handler. Typing /help returns 'Unknown command'.

title: Task list is global (module-level), not session-scoped
description: _current_task_list is a module-level global variable shared across all sessions within the same process. Resuming a different session leaks tasks from the previous session.

title: BashTool ignores tools.shell_timeout_seconds config
description: Config schema defines tools.shell_timeout_seconds: 120. BashTool has a hardcoded default of 120000ms and never reads config.tools.shell_timeout_seconds.

title: spawn_subagent isolation parameter accepted but not implemented
description: isolation parameter with enum ['worktree'] is accepted and stored but no code reads or acts on it. Git worktree isolation is never created.

title: No estimated_tokens tracking on sub-agent spawn logs
description: Pool logs sub-agent spawn/completion but structured fields (subagent_id, parent_session, prompt_summary) are missing from extra dict. Only category is set.

title: Session start does not set log context with session_id
description: LogContext set_context is called at startup before session creation and never updated when the actual session begins. Log records after session creation lack correct session_id.

title: No tools_count in LLM request log
description: Spec example includes 'tools_count': 14. Implementation logs messages_count and estimated_tokens but not tools_count.

title: _react_loop cannot yield Interrupted event because it only checks interrupt in tool execution
description: Interrupted event type is defined but never yielded. The main agent's _react_loop has no mechanism to receive external interruption signal like sub-agent worker does.

title: retry_callback references undefined status_bar — crash at startup
description: LLMProvider constructor receives retry_callback closure referencing status_bar, but status_bar is assigned after LLMProvider is constructed. Python raises UnboundLocalError at runtime.

title: Goal achievement never persisted to session
description: When goal is achieved, _react_loop() yields Done() but never sets session.goal_achieved = True. end_session() unconditionally sets to False when None. Every goal session is recorded as not achieved.

title: Session end does not finalize transcript or mark closed
description: end_session() performs permission and memory prompts but never calls session_store to write a final transcript update. End-of-session state changes are never flushed to disk.

title: Dream engine only checks trigger on startup — never mid-session
description: Dream engine's should_run() is called exactly once at startup. For sessions lasting >6 hours, trigger condition becomes true mid-session but is never re-checked.

title: Status bar token count never updated live
description: StatusBar has tokens field but Done events carrying usage.total_tokens are never propagated to the status bar. Token display always shows 0.

title: code-review SKILL.md scripts/ is a placeholder only
description: code-review skill's scripts/ directory contains only .gitkeep — no actual executable scripts. Declared resource directory is effectively empty.

title: Outdated docstring claims stub implementations exist
description: agent_tools.py header docstring says stubs are used for SubAgentPool and MemoryStore. Both are fully implemented. The comment is misleading and stale.

title: Error log records lack context field per spec
description: Spec requires error logs to include context field describing triggering operation. Several error log calls pass component but not context.

title: Hard truncation (90%) not independently triggered
description: Layer-4 truncation is handled inside compact() which is only called at >=75%. If compact() returns early (minimum_messages check), 90% hard truncation is skipped. Spec shows 90% as independent path.

title: Sub-agent-to-main-agent message channel not implemented
description: send_message tool supports only main-to-sub communication. Sub-agent workers have no path to deliver messages back to the main agent's ReAct loop.

title: ContextBuilder.build() receives goal but engine never passes it
description: ContextBuilder.build() accepts goal parameter and injects 'Current Goal' section, but AgentEngine.run() never passes current goal. Goal injection only happens reactively after failed goal checks.

title: spawn_subagent speculative_exploration guard cannot detect goal mode
description: SpawnSubagentTool.execute() checks context.config._goal and context.config.session._goal — attributes that do not exist. Goal is tracked by GoalTracker, not config. goal variable is always None; goal mode never detected.

title: --config CLI argument accepted but not wired to ConfigLoader
description: parse_args() defines --config but async_main() never reads args.config or passes it anywhere. ConfigLoader has no parameter for custom config path. Flag is silently discarded.

title: SubAgentWorker transcript collection fields never populated
description: SubAgentWorker declares _transcript_messages and _transcript_tool_calls lists but _run_impl() never appends to them. Sub-agent transcript files contain zero messages and zero tool calls.

title: SessionStore base_dir ignores config.session.sessions_dir
description: SessionStore is constructed with no arguments and defaults to hardcoded ~/.myagent/sessions/. The sessions_dir config key is defined in schema but never consumed.

title: Edit tool does not enforce 'must read file first' constraint
description: Spec says editing a file requires reading it first or the call fails. EditTool.execute() performs no such check — it will edit any file regardless of read history.

title: Write tool does not enforce 'must read file before overwriting' constraint
description: Spec says overwriting an unread file fails. WriteTool has _read_files set but only adds to it on overwrite — it never blocks a write based on the set.

title: Dream engine 'correction to memory' uses fragile string matching
description: Memory creation depends on /corrections.*detected/i substring matching on finding text instead of checking the actual correction_count >= 2. Created memory is a generic placeholder.

title: config_set tool not in the design spec tool list
description: ConfigSetTool (config_set) is registered as built-in tool #14 but does not appear in the spec's built-in tool list which enumerates 13 tools.

title: send_message permission level 2 not documented in design spec levels
description: TOOL_LEVEL_MAP assigns send_message to level 2 (exec) alongside bash and spawn_subagent, but the spec's permission level table does not include send_message.

title: MCP resources and prompts are fetched but not integrated into the context system
description: Resources and prompts are fetched and logged but never stored, indexed, or exposed to the agent. MCP resources could be reference data; prompts could be callable templates.

title: Intent detection uses keyword matching instead of model-driven interpretation
description: _detect_intent() pattern-matches on model response text using 30+ hard-coded keywords. Spec says model self-judges intent from natural language during Think phase — not post-hoc text matching.

title: Sub-agent L3 project context passed all-or-nothing, not filtered for task relevance
description: Spec says L3 context for sub-agents should be filtered for task relevance. Implementation passes full project_context unconditionally — all fields injected into sub-agent system prompt.

title: skill_invoke virtual tool not communicated to the model — natural language skill invocation cannot work
description: skill_invoke handling exists in engine but the model receives no instruction about its existence. Neither L0 system prompt nor L2 index mentions skill_invoke. Model will never produce the tool call.

title: Transcript message content truncated at 5000 chars per message
description: _write_transcripts() truncates m.content[:5000]. Long model responses are silently truncated, breaking full traceability as required by spec.

title: send_message tool has no entry in TOOL_LEVEL_MAP
description: send_message is a built-in tool but missing from TOOL_LEVEL_MAP. Falls through to default level 3 (network_write — most restrictive), which is inappropriate for a read-only communication tool.

title: Memory cache never expires within a session — stale on topic change
description: _memory_cache uses a single key from the first user input and never refreshes. Topic changes mid-session get stale cached memories instead of re-running semantic recall.

title: Dream engine round counting misses in-memory current session during mid-session trigger check
description: _periodic_dream_check calls estimate_total_rounds() which reads only persisted transcripts. Current session's in-memory unsaved rounds are not counted, potentially preventing dream trigger.

title: Sub-agent status bar updates only on spawn, not on completion or status change
description: _spawn_with_status wrapper only triggers status bar updates when spawn() is called. Sub-agent completions, failures, and status transitions during execution do not trigger refreshes.
